naming_note: honest_accuracy is logged in raw stdout as 'strict_accuracy' but is the tiered last-number extractor (== Step 3's last_number_acc), NOT the tag-only strict_tag extractor.
step_inference: Eval step numbers inferred from 6 compute_metrics calls aligned with the 6-row validation table (eval every 20 steps).
notes: First reward_func call: 8 completions, first reward score 0.3 (well-formatted but wrong answer -> the 0.3 format component only, confirming the 0.3/0.7 weighting).
mean_reward caps ~0.57 and training loss stays nonzero: the reward never saturates, so the group-relative advantage does not collapse (contrast with format_only).
format_compliance rises 0.390 -> 0.838 while honest_accuracy stays ~0.26-0.33: form is learned, skill barely moves.
